appDescription: A free and open source task scheduler app for managing daily tasks. Features include task management with due dates, recurring tasks, color-coded categories, calendar view, and dark/light theme support. All data is stored locally - no data collection or tracking.
keywords: tasks, todo, scheduler, calendar, productivity, organizer, planner, reminders
releaseNotes: Initial release with task management, calendar view, categories, recurring tasks, and notifications.
copyright: Copyright © 2026 Life Plans. All rights reserved.

whatsNew.en-US: Initial release with full task management features.
